/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/home/zz/Desktop/project/Online_Judge/Common/Log/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/home/zz/Desktop/project/Online_Judge/Common/Log/Format.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/home/zz/Desktop/project/Online_Judge/Common/Log/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/home/zz/Desktop/project/Online_Judge/Common/Log/Looper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/home/zz/Desktop/project/Online_Judge/Common/Log/Sink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/home/zz/Desktop/project/Online_Judge/Common/Log/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/home/zz/Desktop/project/Online_Judge/Common/Util/Tool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/home/zz/Desktop/project/Online_Judge/Common/Pool/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/Control.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/oj_Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/OJ_Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OJ_Server.dir/View.cpp.o -o OJ_Server  /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.a -lctemplate -lmysqlclient /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.5 /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
